emails.subject: Feedback from your eSpeak
emails.body: Feedback from your eSpeak Vince: I had a phone call from Joe Phelan late yesterday. He was thrilled that you had answered his question so thoroughly. I've talked to a few other people who really got a lot out of your session, including someone who wants to come work for you! Thanks, again, for giving us some of your time. er

emails.subject: Re: Feedback from your eSpeak
emails.body: Re: Feedback from your eSpeak Erin, Thanks Vince Enron North America Corp. From: Erin Rice ENRON 07/13/2000 10:17 AM
